signInSubtitle: Use your email, username, or Employee ID
errorRequired: Please enter your login and password.
errorFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
errorNoAccount: No account found with that username or Employee ID.
sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
accessRevoked: Your access has been revoked. Contact your administrator.
mfaSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
awaitingApprovalBody: Your account is pending approval. An administrator will review and activate your account shortly.
awaitingApprovalContact: Please contact your administrator if this takes longer than expected.
accessNoPermission: Your role does not have permission to access this module.
contactAdmin: Contact your administrator to request access.

login.heroDesc: Enterprise-grade tyre lifecycle management, AI-powered analytics, and real-time fleet intelligence - all in one platform.
login.sessionExpiredBanner: Session expired after inactivity. Please sign in again.
login.accessRevokedBanner: Your account access has been suspended. Contact your administrator.
login.resetPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link instantly.
login.resetLinkSentDesc: Check your inbox - link expires in 60 minutes.
login.approvalNotice: 🔒 New accounts require admin approval before access is granted.
login.accountSubmittedDesc: Pending admin approval. You'll receive access once an administrator reviews your request.
login.errNoInternet: No internet connection. Please check your network.
login.errTooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait {secs} seconds.
login.errNoMfaFactor: MFA is required but no authenticator factor found.
login.errPasswordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
login.errUnexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.
